ideation: This animation sequence aims to visually represent the 'A' in the blood type symbol using the robot's arms.  The overall shape resembles a capital 'A', formed by the robot's arms. The sequence starts with the arms extended to the sides, then moves to a position resembling the top of the 'A', and ends with the arms forming the bottom of the 'A'.  Slight variations in wrist angles add to the visual appeal.

frames.beat: arms extend wide, forming the base of the A
arms rise and angle inward, creating the A's crossbar
arms drop and angle out, completing the A shape
